settings.broken: Tọju awọn ibudo ti o fọ

dropdown.dialog-footer: Pin awọn ibudo ayanfẹ rẹ nipasẹ Mii-Link

tooltip.hq: Ṣe afihan awọn ṣiṣan didara ga nikan
tooltip.sort-bitrate: Too awọn ṣiṣan redio nipasẹ bitrate
tooltip.sort-language: To awọn abajade wiwa nipasẹ ede
tooltip.sort-clicks: Too nipasẹ awọn ṣiṣiṣẹsẹhin laarin wakati 24 sẹhin
tooltip.select-country: Awọn ibudo nikan lati orilẹ-ede ti o yan

storage.title: Awọn ayanfẹ fifuye
storage.body: Faili naa ṣofo tabi kii ṣe RadioMii *.rmf faili

del-favs.body: Ṣe o fẹ paarẹ gbogbo awọn ibudo ayanfẹ rẹ bi?
del-favs.title: Paarẹ Awọn ayanfẹ

body.p9: Ti o ba padanu ibudo redio ayanfẹ rẹ, o le ṣafikun si ibi ipamọ data:
body.p8: <1>/clicks</1> gba awọn ibudo ti o dun julọ
body.p7: <1>/votes</1> gba awọn ibudo pẹlu 'Fẹran' pupọ julọ
body.p6: Koodu orilẹ-ede bi <1>/de</1> ṣe atokọ gbogbo awọn ibudo German
body.p5: Gbiyanju awọn aṣẹ ni aaye wiwa:
body.p4: Nọmba awọn ṣiṣiṣẹsẹhin laarin wakati 24 sẹhin
body.p3: Awọn nọmba ti 'Fẹran' a ibudo ni
body.p2: | <1>Aaye</1> Ṣiṣẹ/Daduro | <1>+</1> Iwọn didun soke | <1>-</1> Iwọn didun isalẹ
body.p1: Awọn bọtini Hot: <1>C</1> Iwapọ/Iwoye Boṣewa | <1>L</1> Tan/pa ina | <1>S</1> ṣe afihan/tọju awọn aṣayan wiwa

empty-state.body-favs: Wa ayanfẹ rẹ ṣiṣan ki o si tẹ awọn
